Commercial Stucco in Hays County, TX

Hays County sits at the crossroads of Austin's southward growth and the scenic Hill Country, blending university-town energy in San Marcos with booming suburban commerce in Kyle, Buda, and Dripping Springs. Star Stucco of Austin provides commercial stucco services to businesses navigating this dynamic market.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Commercial Stucco Across Hays County's Growing Corridors

The I-35 corridor through Hays County has become one of the fastest-developing commercial strips in Central Texas. Kyle and Buda have seen explosive retail and restaurant growth, while San Marcos continues to expand its outlet shopping, hotel, and student-oriented commercial sectors. Each of these markets demands exterior finishes that look sharp and perform under constant use.

West of the interstate, Dripping Springs and Wimberley have developed their own distinct commercial identities, with boutique retail, wineries, event venues, and professional offices that favor stucco finishes reflecting Hill Country aesthetics. Our team understands the design expectations in these communities and applies finishes that complement the natural surroundings.

Hays County's position along the Balcones Escarpment creates varied soil and drainage conditions from one job site to the next. We adapt our approach based on whether the building sits on the limestone shelf west of I-35 or the clay-heavy bottomlands closer to the San Marcos River.

What's Included With Our Commercial Stucco in Hays County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Site Assessment

We evaluate your Hays County property's wall systems, soil conditions, and building orientation to design the right stucco approach for the site.

Project Planning & Scheduling

Our plan balances your business calendar with weather windows and any coordination needed for the busy I-35 corridor or quieter Hill Country locations.

Surface Preparation

We clean, repair, and prime all wall surfaces to ensure the new stucco system bonds properly and performs over the long term.

Commercial-Grade Application

Our crews apply stucco using commercial techniques that deliver uniform coverage and consistent thickness across large exterior wall areas.

Finish Coat & Detailing

The final coat is applied to your specifications, with careful attention to color consistency, texture uniformity, and clean lines at all transitions.

Final Inspection & Warranty

We complete a walk-through to verify quality and provide written warranty coverage for your commercial stucco project.

Common Commercial Stucco Needs in Hays County

Hays County's diverse commercial market generates a steady stream of stucco projects. These are the types of work we handle throughout the county.

New Construction Exteriors

New commercial developments along I-35 in Kyle and Buda, and mixed-use projects in San Marcos, require stucco systems installed to spec from the ground up.

Storefront Renovation

The San Marcos downtown square, Wimberley village shops, and Dripping Springs boutiques attract customers with fresh, well-maintained stucco exteriors that reflect local character.

Multifamily Buildings

Student housing near Texas State University and family apartments along the Kyle-Buda corridor need durable stucco that handles high turnover and heavy daily use.

Office Park Stucco

Professional offices and medical buildings in San Marcos and Dripping Springs maintain credibility with clean, consistent stucco finishes on their exterior walls.

Retail Center Restoration

Outlet malls, shopping centers, and roadside retail along I-35 and Ranch Road 12 benefit from stucco restoration that addresses weather wear and refreshes curb appeal.

HOA Common Areas

Master-planned communities in Buda, Kyle, and Dripping Springs maintain common buildings, entry features, and perimeter walls with stucco finishes that match the original architecture.

Why Choose Us for Commercial Stucco in Hays County?

  • Active project history across San Marcos, Kyle, Buda, Wimberley, and Dripping Springs
  • Insurance and bonding coverage that meets the requirements of national retail and hospitality chains
  • Project scheduling designed to avoid disruption to outlet mall shoppers, restaurant patrons, and office tenants
  • Stucco solutions tailored to the varied terrain from the I-35 flatlands to the Balcones Escarpment
  • Compliance with San Marcos, Kyle, Buda, and Dripping Springs building permit and inspection requirements
  • Durable material systems chosen for the high humidity and intense sun exposure common in Hays County

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Hays County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Commercial Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule a Commercial Consultation

Contact us to arrange a meeting at your Hays County commercial property. We will discuss the project scope and review your priorities.

2

Site Inspection & Scope

We inspect the building exterior, photograph existing conditions, and measure wall areas to develop an accurate scope of work.

3

Detailed Bid & Timeline

Your written proposal includes a cost breakdown, material specifications, and a schedule that works with your tenant and business needs.

4

Professional Execution

Our team delivers the work as proposed, maintaining communication with you throughout and completing a final quality review on the last day.
